name: Visions

pages.text: A blank vision. A diving being (you, or a friend) must infuse it with power for it to become usable.$(br2)Using it will infuse it with the player's aspect, granting the wielder its aspect's first buff.
Combine a Cueball and an Ender Portal Frame in a Totem Lathe.

pages: If a mortal (any player without an aspect) infuses it, it will create a dull vision which can still block effects.
If Curios is installed, the vision(s) must be equipped by the player for any effect.
